Name: Inference Monitor
Description: Live usage limits and balances for your inference providers, with a Provider Switch key to cycle them.

Actions.Name: Provider Tile
Actions.Tooltip: Show a limit/balance metric of the active provider — place one Primary and one Secondary

Actions.Name: Provider Switch
Actions.Tooltip: Cycle the active provider — the Provider Tiles follow it

Localization.TileHint: Place TWO Provider Tiles next to a Provider Switch: set one to Primary and one to Secondary. They render whichever provider the switch has selected — usage windows for Claude & OpenAI, plan/renewal for Ollama Cloud, balance & spend for OpenRouter & Nous.
Localization.SwitchHint: Run inf-agent on the host that holds your provider keys (see the project README) and enter its address, e.g. http://100.x.y.z:9890 over Tailscale. Pressing this key cycles the active provider; the Provider Tiles follow it.
